ec2.ipamresourcediscovery.CfnAbout: A resource discovery is an IPAM component that enables IPAM to manage and monitor resources that belong to the owning account.

ec2.ipamresourcediscovery.OperatingRegio.Description: The operating Regions for the resource discovery. Operating Regions are AWS Regions where the IPAM is allowed to manage IP address CIDRs. IPAM only discovers and monitors resources in the AWS Regions you select as operating Regions.

ec2.ipamresourcediscovery.Tags.Description: A tag is a label that you assign to an AWS resource. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. You can use tags to search and filter your resources or track your AWS costs.
